title: pelargonium × dubium
intro: Pelargonium × dubium, also known as Mountain Geranium or Rose Geranium, is a hybrid of the Pelargonium species that is native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Pelargonium × dubium include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, and its ability to regulate hormones and menstrual cycles. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments and to promote relaxation and well-being.
